description_long: This is a compact, black, submachine gun-style rifle with a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The body is predominantly matte black metal, featuring a simple tubular receiver and a detachable box magazine extending downward. The grip is angled and ergonomic, made of a polymer or plastic material, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. The rifle lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for control. There is a small, basic iron sight on top, and the overall design is utilitarian, likely intended for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a suppressor, detachable box magazine, and pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, suppressor, detachable magazine, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's circular opening and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with visible suppressor, magazine, and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the alignment of the suppressor and magazine.
